difficulty.reason: Long season, frost-sensitive, slow to start, needs warm position

growth_stages.name: Seedling
growth_stages.look_for: Small sturdy plant with dark green leaves

growth_stages.name: Transplant & Establishment
growth_stages.look_for: Plant settling in, new leaves appearing at top

prompt.en: Give the pepper a drink -- it's getting used to living outside now!
prompt.da: Giv peberen en taar vand -- den vaenner sig til at bo udenfor nu!

growth_stages.name: Flowering
growth_stages.look_for: Small white flowers that turn into tiny green peppers

prompt.en: Behind the white flowers, look for tiny green peppers forming! How many can you count?
prompt.da: Bag de hvide blomster, kig efter smaa groenne pebre der dannes! Hvor mange kan du taelle?

growth_stages.name: Fruiting
growth_stages.look_for: Green peppers turning red as they ripen

prompt.en: Wait for RED -- red peppers are sweeter! Twist and pull gently!
prompt.da: Vent paa ROED -- roede pebre er soedere! Drej og traek forsigtigt!

human_readable.en: Water consistently. Peppers need even moisture for good fruit development.
human_readable.da: Vand jaevnt. Pebre har brug for jaevn fugt for god frugtudvikling.

harvest.notes: Pick green or wait for red (sweeter). Cold-hardy variety for Danish climate but still needs warm position.

companion_plants.notes: Same family as tomatoes, similar needs. Compact variety works alongside staked tomato.

message.en: Cold warning for peppers! Cover or bring indoors tonight!
message.da: Kuldeadvarsel for pebre! Daek eller tag ind i aften!

message.en: Peppers need water -- fruit won't develop properly if soil is dry!
message.da: Pebre har brug for vand -- frugten udvikles ikke ordentligt, hvis jorden er toer!
